title: OmniFormatter CSS / SCSS / Less / Stylus / Sass / HTML Configuration Schema
description: Merged formatting configuration for CSS-family languages and HTML. Defaults match Prettier 3.x.

singleQuote.description: Use single quotes in CSS attribute selectors and values.

numberLeadingZero.description: Require leading zero for fractional numbers: 0.5 vs .5.

selectorSeparatorNewline.description: Put each selector on its own line in multi-selector rules.

variablePrefix.description: Variable prefix: $ for SCSS/Sass, @ for Less.

htmlWhitespaceSensitivity.description: [HTML] How to handle inline element whitespace.

attributeQuotes.description: [HTML] Attribute values MUST be quoted. Double quotes are HTML standard.

selfClosingVoidElements.description:
[HTML] Self-closing slash on void elements (
vs
). false = HTML5 style.

vueIndentScriptAndStyle.description: [Vue SFC] Indent <script> and <style> blocks inside .vue files.
